title: fed balance sheet / reserve management purchases / ample reserves | Speech Neutral | Reflections on the Early Days of Reserve Management Purchase...
summary: SOMA Manager Roberto Perli outlined the Federal Reserve's transition from an abundant to an ample reserves regime, detailing how balance sheet runoff and TGA dynamics tightened money market conditions in 2025. The FOMC concluded SOMA securities runoff effective December 1, 2025, after which reserve management purchases (RMPs) began to maintain reserves within the ample range.
